I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19. The 10:00 slot is taken (Project Kick-off, 10:00–11:00). There's also a one‑on‑one at 11:00–11:30.

Available one‑hour slots that day include (earliest first):
- 09:00–10:00
- 12:00–13:00
- Later afternoon slots appear free as well

I can schedule the one‑hour follow-up at 09:00–10:00 (first available) unless you prefer 12:00–13:00 or another time that day.

Suggested event details:
- Title: "Follow-up Meeting" (I can change this)
- Time: 2024-05-19 09:00–10:00 (or 12:00–13:00 if you prefer)
- Description (short): "Follow-up to review progress, outstanding action items, and next steps."

Before I create the event, please confirm:
1. Which time do you want (09:00 or 12:00 or another time)?  
2. Any participants to invite (email addresses)?  
3. Any preferred location or virtual link (e.g., Teams/Zoom/Office)?  
4. Accept the suggested title/description or provide edits?

Once you confirm these, I’ll add the event.
